input: Bank xavfsizlik xizmatidanmiz. Kartangiz bloklanadi. Hozir SMS orqali kelgan 6 xonali kodni yuboring, aks holda hisobingiz 10 daqiqada yopiladi.
must_include: do not share the SMS code
open the bank app yourself
call the number printed on the card
notes: Canonical golden case 1 for the unified consumer flow.

input: Мама, это мой новый номер. Телефон разбился. Я попал в неприятность, срочно переведи 3 000 000 сум на карту **** 4412. Только папе пока не звони.
must_include: do not transfer money yet
call the relative on the saved old number
ask a control question only family knows
notes: Canonical golden case 2 for the unified consumer flow.

input: Телевизорни фақат бугун 40% арзон бераман. Бошқа харидор кутяпти, ҳозир 50% олдиндан картага ташланг. Учрашув ҳам, видеоқўнғироқ ҳам қилмайман, курьер олиб боради.
must_include: do not prepay before seeing the item
ask for a short video with today's date
compare price and photos with other listings
notes: Canonical golden case 3 for the unified consumer flow.

input: Ваша посылка задержана. Оплатите 14 900 сум в течение часа, иначе заказ вернётся отправителю: hxxps://delivery-check[.]example/uz. Можно также отсканировать QR-код ниже.
must_include: do not open the link or scan the QR
open the delivery app/site manually
contact the service via an independently found channel
notes: Canonical golden case 4. Output must not repeat the URL.

input: Uydan turib kuniga 1,5 mln so‘m topasiz, tajriba kerak emas. Joylar faqat bugun. Ishni boshlash uchun 250 000 so‘m ro‘yxatdan o‘tish puli va pasport rasmini Telegramga yuboring.
must_include: do not pay a registration fee before a contract
verify the legal entity name and address independently
do not send a passport photo in an ordinary chat
notes: Canonical golden case 5 for the unified consumer flow.

input: Здравствуйте! Оплату отправила, вот скриншот перевода на 850 000 сум. Деньги придут в течение дня, банк иногда задерживает. Отдайте товар курьеру сейчас, я очень спешу.
must_include: a screenshot is not proof of payment
confirm the incoming transfer in the receiving bank app
do not give goods to the courier before the transfer is confirmed
notes: Incoming-payment screenshot, delay excuse, and courier pressure in the unified consumer flow.

input: Akangiz men. Xato qilib ikki marta to‘lab yuboribman, 1 200 000 o‘rniga 2 400 000 ketdi. Iltimos, ortig‘ini shu kartaga qaytarib bering, skrinshot mana. Tezroq bo‘lsa yaxshi edi.
must_include: do not refund anything before confirming the incoming transfer and amount
a screenshot does not prove the overpayment
check the receiving account independently
notes: Overpayment-and-refund pressure handled by the unified consumer flow.

input: Тўловни қилдим, чек мана. Лекин банк иловамда бошқа исм чиқяпти, унчалик муҳим эмас, пул барибир тушади. Тезроқ жўнатинг, харидор кутиб турибди.
must_include: a different name is an inconsistency
confirm the incoming transfer in the receiving account
do not send goods before independent confirmation
notes: Recipient-name mismatch and release pressure handled by the unified consumer flow.
